channel.title: robots on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in robots on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Artificial Intelligent Robots
item.description: Some people believe that eventually all jobs will be done by artificially intelligent robots. What is your opinion? Artificial intelligent robots are gradually replacing workers in the workforce. While it is possible that all repetitive tasks will be automated by robots, I personally believe that some jobs which require human intervention will never be replaced. On the one hand, robotic machines could undoubtedly perform mundane, labor-intensive and repetitive jobs not only quicker and cheaper but also more precise than human counterparts.
